title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models for chat, embeddings, tool-calling and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama; Kotlin & Android friendly.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with ergonomic commands and fzf integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a free local GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for generative QA and embeddings pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal Streamlit chatbot that RAGs your documents with Ollama embeddings + Llama 3.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Community-curated list of custom Modelfiles and quantized GGUFs ready for ollama pull.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that exposes Ollama chat, image and embedding endpoints to Discord servers.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for Ollama REST API with async/await and native JSON handling.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client with LINQ-style chat builders and Blazor sample app.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on your notes and summarize vault content.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All UI branch that adds Ollama as an optional local backend alongside llama.cpp.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate providing async client and strong typing for Ollama endpoints.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper leveraging Finch for HTTP and GenServer for persistent chat sessions.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that exposes Ollama models with built-in rate limiting and auth.
